---
title: "Ben S. Knight"
---

```{=html}
<p>Models by <span class="badge-creator">Ben S. Knight</span>:</p>

<div class="models-grid">

  <!-- ── Model card: Yu-2025-granulites ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <a href="/models/Yu-2025-granulites.html" class="mc-card-container"
     data-title="rift foundering and the generation of non-orogenic granulites during the mesoproterozoic"
     data-tags="granulites melt emplacement"
     data-creators="ben s. knight">
    <img src="https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23468159/Model_evolution.pdf"
         alt="Rift foundering and the generation of non-orogenic granulites during the Mesoproterozoic"
         onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/600x300/D64000/white?text=M%40TE+Model';" />
    <h3>Rift foundering and the generation of non-orogenic granulites during the Mesoproterozoic</h3>
    <p class="mc-card-abstract">Mesoproterozoic orogens are unusual in that they commonly preserve a record of high geothermal gradients, low crustal thickness, and limited topography. One such terrane is the Fraser Zone in the Albany–Fraser Orogen (AFO), Western Australia, where granulite-facies rocks record a counterclockwise...</p>
    <div class="mc-card-meta">
      <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/ben-s-knight.html">Ben S. Knight</a>
      <br/>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/granulites.html">granulites</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/melt.html">melt</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/emplacement.html">emplacement</a>
      <br/>
      <a class="badge-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.25914/0a2t-by03" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span>
        <span class="badge-doi-right">10.25914/0a2t-by03</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```
